title: Interstellar
summary: A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity while exploring love, sacrifice, and time.

title: Memento
summary: A man with short-term memory loss investigates his wife's murder using notes and tattoos in a nonlinear narrative.

title: KGF
summary: A poor young man rises through the violent gold mafia world seeking power, respect, and destiny.

title: Inception
summary: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets and plant ideas inside people's minds. The story explores dreams, subconscious reality, memory, guilt, deception, layered narratives, imagination, and psychological conflict.

title: The Prestige
summary: Two rival stage magicians become obsessed with creating the greatest illusion. The story explores rivalry, magic, obsession, sacrifice, secrets, competition, deception, and the cost of ambition.

title: Joker
summary: A lonely and mentally troubled man is abandoned by society and slowly descends into madness. The story explores chaos, mental illness, isolation, rebellion, injustice, violence, identity, society, and transformation.

title: The Matrix
summary: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulation controlled by intelligent machines. The story explores artificial intelligence, freedom, rebellion, destiny, technology, virtual reality, awakening, humanity's survival, and the fight against oppression.

title: Ex Machina
summary: A young programmer is invited to evaluate an advanced artificial intelligence. The story explores AI consciousness, manipulation, identity, technology, deception, trust, control, ethics, and the blurred line between humans and machines.

title: Blade Runner 2049
summary: A futuristic detective uncovers a secret that challenges humanity's understanding of identity and existence. The story explores artificial intelligence, memory, loneliness, humanity, consciousness, purpose, destiny, and what it means to be alive.

title: Fight Club
summary: A dissatisfied office worker forms an underground fight club that evolves into a dangerous movement exploring identity, masculinity, rebellion, and self-destruction.

title: Whiplash
summary: A talented young drummer pursues greatness under a demanding and abusive mentor. The story explores obsession, ambition, perfectionism, sacrifice, discipline, excellence, pressure, competition, and personal achievement.

title: Dune
summary: A young noble is forced into exile and must embrace his destiny to lead a rebellion. The story explores prophecy, leadership, survival, war, destiny, political intrigue, power struggles, sacrifice, and revolution.

title: The Dark Knight
summary: A vigilante hero protects a crime-ridden city from a chaotic criminal mastermind. The story explores justice, morality, chaos, order, crime, corruption, sacrifice, heroism, impossible choices, enemies, and the limits of force.

title: The Social Network
summary: A brilliant programmer creates a social networking platform that transforms the world. The story explores entrepreneurship, technology, startups, friendship, betrayal, ambition, innovation, competition, business rivalry, wealth, and success.

title: Parasite
summary: A poor family living in poverty gradually infiltrates the home of a wealthy family through deception and manipulation. The story explores class inequality, rich versus poor, wealth, poverty, social status, survival, greed, family loyalty, privilege, economic disparity, and tragedy.
